title: BetterSettings
description: this mod adds search and profile functionality to minecraft settings
body:
# Description
BetterSettings brings two small but long-overdue improvements to the vanilla options menu.
A search bar sits at the top of every settings screen, letting you find any option across all menus by typing at least three characters. Results pull directly from the live settings list, so nothing gets missed including options added by other mods.
Profile support lets you save your current settings under a named preset and switch between them at any time. Useful for switching between performance and quality configs, or keeping separate setups for singleplayer and servers. Profiles are stored as plain text files and are easy to back up or share.
No dependencies. No config. Works out of the box.


![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/186db3d4584feff87fbe94c05f9142815a1880a6.jpeg)
